introSection: Nickelodeon Slime Streak is a steel indoor roller coaster located at Nickelodeon Universe American Dream in East Rutherford, New Jersey, USA. It opened on October 25, 2019. The ride is themed to Nickelodeon's iconic green slime that originated from You Can't Do That On Television.
fullText: Nickelodeon Slime Streak is a steel indoor roller coaster located at Nickelodeon Universe American Dream in East Rutherford, New Jersey, USA. It opened on October 25, 2019. The ride is themed to Nickelodeon's iconic green slime that originated from You Can't Do That On Television.
